## Type
- [ ] Bug fix in existing prompt
- [ ] Improvement to existing prompt
- [ ] New prompt
- [ ] English translation
- [ ] Documentation / meta files

## Checklist
- [ ] Prompt follows the [structure standard](CONTRIBUTING.md#prompt-structure-standard)
- [ ] `Son Güncelleme` / `Last Updated` header updated
- [ ] If new prompt: triage reference table updated in both TR and EN
- [ ] If new prompt: `NAVIGATION_STANDARD.md` and `GROWTH_STRATEGY.md` updated
- [ ] Checklist has at least 6 items
- [ ] No placeholder content without `[fill for your system]` notes
- [ ] No project/person-specific names in prompt title or body
